title: Vežba 40

questions.text:
U svom članku, "Koji programski jezik bih trebao da naučim prvi?", Quincy Larson, osnivač i tutor freeCodeCamp-a, objašnjava zašto JavaScript je najbolji jezik za učenje na početku.

I think JavaScript is the best language to start with. It's flexible and can be used for both front-end and back-end development. With libraries and tools like Node.js, you can build many things, from simple prototypes to big apps. Plus, there is a lot of demand for JavaScript developers, so it's a good choice for beginners.

In my case, Python is also a good language, but I believe JavaScript is more useful in the long run. It has a large community and many resources to help you learn. I feel it's easier to find support when you start learning it.

I'd rather see beginners focus on JavaScript first. Once you know it, learning other languages like Python becomes easier. It's a great way to begin your journey in programming and open up more career opportunities.

Šta Quincy Larson kaže o Python?

answers.answer: Python takođe je lep jezik, ali JavaScript je upotrebljiviji.

answers.feedback: Quincy tvrdi da je Python dobar, ali veruje da je JavaScript upotrebljivije dugoročno.
Quincy objašnjava Python kao dobar jezik, ne samo da je pogodan za JavaScript dugoročnu upotrebu.
Quincy nije spomenuo veličinu zajednice Python. Fokusira se na veliku zajednicu i resurse JavaScript.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation:
Pronađite ključne reči koje pokazuju pogled Kvinsija o Python.

Also a good language – Ovo pokazuje da Quincy vidi Python kao dobar izbor.

More useful in the long run – Ovo vam govori da i dalje preferira JavaScript od Python za početnike.

Large community and many resources – Ovo objašnjava zašto veruje JavaScript je najbolji prvi izbor.
